date_created.description: The date when the distribution configuration was created.

date_updated.description: The date when the distribution configuration was last updated.

description.description: A brief explanation or details about the distribution configuration.

distribution.description: The configuration details for distributing images across different regions and accounts.

id.description: The unique identifier for the distribution configuration.

name.description: The name assigned to the distribution configuration.

tags.description: A set of key-value pairs associated with the distribution configuration for organizational purposes.
